programme.desc: Apparitions of a dead wife appear to be linked to a secondhand purse recently purchased by the groom's next bride (Kris Aquino).

programme.title: Soltera
programme.desc: Sandra hastily gets into a relationship with Eric due to her fear of being single and alone. However, their age difference complicates their union.

programme.title: Give Me Five
programme.desc: Xiao Wu returns to his former home to retrieve the memory of his father suffering from Alzheimer's disease, but his plan is disrupted by an accident.

programme.desc: A woman looking for acceptance, love and appreciation finds what she is looking for from her personal assistant.

programme.title: Kasunduan
programme.desc: August, an orphan, sheds off his compassionate and idealistic self once he enters the world of organized crime and becomes a criminal.

programme.title: Miracle of Love
programme.desc: Gabriel, heartbroken over a failed relationship, decides to go on a European vacation. He then meets and falls in love with a terminally ill woman.

programme.title: Won't Last a Day Without You
programme.desc: The daughter (Sarah Geronimo) of a rock star works as a late-night radio host and gives advice to the lovelorn.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it’s a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: Artist to Icon

programme.title: Artist to Icon

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Jim Carrey’s The Mask director Chuck Russell, The Duck Factory co-star Teresa Ganzel, Man On The Moon executive producer Michael Hausman, plus many more.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: See how the British bomber Lancaster flew out of the factory and into action, leading devastating attacks on Germany.

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Ireland, the twins join Evanna and her family for hurling matches, traditional dance, Potter nostalgia, and a spine-tingling countryside adventure!

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam learns to make authentic beef rendang from a local Muslim family. He visits the National Archives of Singapore to learn about his mother's family, and continues his search for inspiration for his Singapore banquet dinner.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam goes in search of the best seafood that Singapore has to offer. His journey begins inside the Marina Bay Sands resort complex where many celebrity chefs have opened eateries.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In his quest to find the best ingredients for his banquet dinner, Adam Liaw visits a colourful fruit and veg market in Geylang and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In between some cocktail-tasting pit stops, Adam Liaw discovers some of the finest desserts in Singapore, from homemade Peranakan sweet treats to a sophisticated dessert bar.

programme.title: Expedition From Hell: The Lost Tapes (S1)
programme.desc: Mickey loses his grip on the expedition. His questionable motives cause chaos, leading to a kidnapping and a shocking firing.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground.

programme.title: Jaws vs Leviathan
programme.desc: In New Zealand, a clash of titans is about to erupt: the Great White versus a 60-foot leviathan.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour (S2)
programme.desc: In Barcelona, Mike and Elvis try to restore a SEAT 600, but an unexpected breakdown and some nasty bills put the boys' profit margin in peril.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (Season 18b) (S18)
programme.desc: Mike is seduced by a Land Rover Discovery Mk1 with low mileage. But with no MoT, a leaking sunroof and rust problems, Elvis has his work cut out buying parts.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant and his dad find a “perfect” Woodie but there's a catch. There's no engine! The farmhouse is in danger of collapse due to rotten wooden beams.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis buy a piece of the Champagne lifestyle on a budget: a Silver Spirit that looks past its best. Can they make it turn a profit?

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S9)
programme.desc: A new client, Rick Mezich from Deadliest Catch, tests Dave's design prowess on his CF1. Plus, the upholstery shop shows off new processes to streamline the builds.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: Hold on tight for a hilarious rollercoaster of laughs! Dive into action-packed clips filled with big thrills, spills, and countless surprises!

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: Get ready for edge-of-your-seat laughter! This week's comedy clips push boundaries and guarantee thrills -- no license is required, but buckle up for the ride!

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S1)
programme.desc: Matt must turn BBQ smokers into big bucks at a Texas-sized mess in Houston. At a second job, a massive termite infestation could eat the profits.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour (S2)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turkey in search of one of the rarest cars they've ever bought, the Anadol STC16, but the one they find needs major work.

programme.desc: A chance encounter in Utah escalates from death threats in a parking lot to a demolition derby on the interstate.

programme.desc: Mike and Elvis tackle a classic Toyota Landcruiser. Mike takes a gamble and imports an original 70s one from Japan, not knowing what state it will arrive in.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 91
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Who the Bloody Hell Are We? - John Safran
programme.desc: Filmmaker, author and perennial troublemaker John Safran embarks on a playful quest to discover the role that Jews have played in modern Australia's story.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 5
programme.desc: It's a quiet start at the Brisbane Operation Centre. Operator Harrison fears this is the calm before the storm and sure enough, it soon becomes a busy day with a range of medical emergencies that put the team to the test.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Saudi Arabia's Reality Check
programme.desc: The US and Israel's war against Iran could not have come at a worse time for Saudi Arabia. The region's instability is impacting a multi-trillion dollar economic and social transformation underway in the Kingdom.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 14
programme.desc: As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.

programme.title: National Press Club Address - Amanda Lacaze - Managing Director of Lynas Rare Earths
programme.desc: Amanda Lacaze, CEO and Managing Director of Lynas Rare Earths speaks about "An historical perspective on the slow awakening of the West to the importance of the rare earths industry and challenges for governments today".

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 91
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Mark Humphries
programme.desc: Satirist Mark Humphries joins Alice in the kitchen to talk up the virtues of anchovies before Alice tries to impress Mark with beetroot - not the easiest task!

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 8
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 127
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 72
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 9 - Fremantle v Hawthorn
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: I was actually there - Port Arthur Massacre
programme.desc: On an autumn morning at Port Arthur's historic convict settlement, a gunman walked into the Broad Arrow Cafe, killing 35 people. We go deep inside the experience, hear from first hand witnesses to understand what happened.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Boots

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 21 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

When Kian Heng learns about this, he was shocked.

It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！
